items.description: Scalable open-source game backend server: multiplayer, matchmaking, leaderboards, chat, and social features for games.
items.cn_summary: 可扩展开源游戏后端，支持多人对战等。

items.title: huggingface/transformers
items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
items.cn_summary: HuggingFace核心库，支持多模态模型推理与训练

items.title: bytedance/deer-flow
items.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
items.cn_summary: 字节开源长时SuperAgent，支持研究与编码。

items.title: Pancake
items.description: OpenClaw in Slack that makes your company autonomous
items.cn_summary: Slack中的AI代理，让公司自主运营

items.title: Future Dynamic 3D Reconstruction: A 3D World Model with Disentangled Ego-Motion
items.description: Forecasting the evolution of dynamic environments is crucial for autonomous agents. While generative world models have recently achieved high photorealism in 2D video synthesis by mixing ego-motion and environmental dynamics within the image plane, they exhibit physical inconsistencies, such as morphing or vanishing objects, especially over long time horizons. In this paper, we propose FR3D, a world model that predicts a persistent 3D latent representation for future dynamic 3D reconstruction. U
items.cn_summary: 解耦自我运动的3D动态世界模型重建
